name: featured
description: Featured card + sub-grid — one prominent item with supporting cards.
purpose: Use after a comparison or evaluation to land the recommendation: the featured card is the winner; the sub-grid shows the alternatives or context.

items.description: First li becomes the featured card; remaining lis form the sub-grid. Lead each with **Title.** then body.

## Applying the criteria, here is where the evidence points.

- **Featured recommendation.** One to two sentences making the case.
- **Supporting card.** Short context on a related option.
- **Supporting card.** Short context on another option.
- **Supporting card.** Short context on another option.
